that?

The reason we have this is, you know, things like domain authority and the links associated to that is important for the foundational, like, aspects of our content to rank and for their traffic to grow.
It doesn't mean that if they are low domain authority, we can't necessarily drive growth, but it certainly can limit it, especially if they're going after very competitive searches.
For those who may not be aware, you know.
So to something like a SEMrush, you know, you can get this authority score.
You know, these different tools have their own kind of take on this.
But generally what an authority score is just weighing is based off your unique referring domains and their authority at pointing to your site.
So it's a bit of an oversimplification, but from a high level, that is a big driver in this.
And the main logic being that if you are an authoritative site, other authoritative sites would link to you.
If that is then the case, then Google is going to be more incentivized to want to show your content versus others.
It's one of many, many, many things they try to factor in when ranking content.
And so here, like 42 is pretty solid.

There is a there is logic to, hey, develop really great content and people will link to you.
And that is a real thing.

But more so where we're leading is for that to be more partnership focused.

And so finding, you know, those we can partner with to work with a variety of different sites that have that right profile and alignment to the type of customers we have and then start to kind of work through that to be able to create content.

You tap into and some of it's very legit, some of it's quite shady.
And so we're in the midst of like trying to find those that are legit.
You know, one of the things I found when I was at Homebase, for example, was like we had one partner building links for us and, you know, some of them were good.
But you actually like double clicked into the like the websites they were building links on.
It's like like you see an article and it's like, oh, this article looks very legit and super useful.
And like just surface.
Well, it looks like, you know, this website is relevant to us.
But then you actually check out the website and it's a link farm.
Essentially, it's just like they write about everything under the sun in terms of content.
And Google started to penalize that kind of stuff.

That's why, you know, I don't know if you all have seen like I feel like I'm getting sick of seeing it personally, but everyone talking about HubSpot's drop in traffic and then hot takes and what happened and this and that.
What people are really missing about this is the broadness of the topics they were talking about.
And that was a really core purpose.

Like Google, one of the big algorithmic shifts last year was like really trying to better interpret what is the core theme of your website, probably about, and then putting you into those guardrails to a degree.
Right.

Affiliate websites, because of that, got hit really hard because they're trying to cover all of these different topics.
And so if we start developing links from those websites, that wouldn't be the most ideal for our customers, right?

We'll figure it out.

you, Kyle.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members by providing an overview of GrowthX's work streams and customer use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX focuses primarily on content-driven strategies, starting with editorial and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Current work streams include editorial (50-100k words/mo), programmatic SEO, and link building](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Potential future offerings: interview-first content, distribution/repurposing, and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Emphasis on customizing approaches for clients (e.g., podcast content repurposing for Galileo)](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Strategic Focus

  - [Initially focused on content to establish a foundation for customer engagements](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Content strategy informs distribution channels (SEO, social, email)](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Emphasis on driving attributable revenue, not just traffic](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Exploring lead magnet creation (e.g., gated assets) to enhance value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### Current Work Streams

  - [Editorial: 50-100k words/mo (7-15 articles/week), not limited to traditional blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO: Templated approach for scaling content across variants (e.g., Ramp's per diem pages)](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Link building: Crucial for improving domain authority, exploring partnership-focused approaches](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

### Editorial Content Strategies

  - [Flexible approach beyond standard blogs (e.g., Yurko's use case pages)](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Creative content repurposing (e.g., Galileo's podcast episode expansions)](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [Emphasis on understanding client needs and creating unique value propositions](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

### Programmatic SEO Insights

  - [Ideal for industry-specific or location-based content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Requires careful template design and cross-functional collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/phwxRfSNZs5cDoB9TUrTJGnWfMz35EPY?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
